scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,wiki,client" -c "blue,green,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix wiki" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix wiki && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix wiki && npm run build --prefix client
